entry.title: Re: Public Cloud: fiscalization in Croatia: how to link a...
entry.content:
Hi,

We can set the user parameter for charging device in S4H Public Cloud by using App "Croatia Fiscalization : Maintain User Default Parameters" with Parameter ID "/CCEE/FISC_CD".

Please refer to below link for more details.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6bb5f95d7bf0435f9e5cb34bdb8e909e/4735dae28ac7426aa2a1bd30bbd4f087.html?locale=en-US&q=croatia+fiscalization


Thanks,
Monika

entry.title: How to integrate the international version of buyer address in the “From” field of the SBN Order
entry.content:
Hello. experts!

 

Our customer utilizes SAP S/4HANA integrated with Supplier Business Network (SBN).

While they are a Japanese company, they conduct business with international suppliers.

Therefore, we need to display the "From" field of the SBN purchase orders in English for these overseas suppliers.

 

The "From" field in SBN orders is mapped to E1EDK14[QUALF = 011] in the IDoc segment transmitted from S/4HANA.

In the ADRC table of S/4HANA, the company code's address number (ADRC-ADDRNUMBER) contains both a Japanese version (where ADRC-NATION is blank) and an international version (where ADRC-NATION is "I").

Could you please advise how to retrieve the international version of the address in the IDoc segment E1EDK14[QUALF = 011]?

entry.title: Re: C_ABAPD: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer...
entry.content: @Sijin_Chandran are there any practice questions or sample papers that can assist in preparation other than that already provided by SAP?

entry.title: Re: C_ABAPD: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer...
entry.content: @EzmaHafeezno as such! Only some Sample 10 questions I guess you can get from the demo page, if I am not wrong. These courses should suffice.

entry.title: Re: C_ABAPD: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer...
entry.content: Ok thanks

entry.title: Re: problem on paste data from clipboard to excel sheet
entry.content: any update?

entry.title: Grid Table Display Issue in MDK V24.11
entry.content:
Hello,

We're experiencing a display issue with grid tables in MDK V24.11 for web. When creating a grid table without a grid header, the first column only displays one word of data. This issue was not present in the previous version (V24.7.5).

Has anyone else encountered this problem with the latest update? If so, do you have any suggestions or workarounds to resolve this display issue?

Thank you for your assistance!

entry.title: Re: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content: Hi shubh create a workbench request or transport of copies request in DEV system which is already on EHP8 and add all the effected objects in Quality to this request and import this request in Quality system. Post import remove it from the transport queue to ensure that this request does not move to the subsequent systems.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to display PDF by default in /OPT/VIM_WP image tab instead of XML?
entry.content:
Hi Yam,

We still don't have complete solution but we have done some analysis which might work as work around, we are currently working on attachment of new PDF and after that Display part will be done. i can give the solution once implemented and confirm its feasibility, but for now can you let me know how are you creating the pdf? are you converting the XML to pdf or attaching file from Al11?

entry.title: Unable to load the tile Maintenance Backlog Overview(F5105)
entry.content:
Getting error as below for the app Maintenance Backlog Overview.

  1. Cannot read properties of undefined (reading "oCrossAppNavService")

entry.title: How are Confirmation comments/records sorted in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hello, experts!

This is question about a scenario where a supplier submits an Order Confirmation with multiple delivery dates for a single schedule line.

The supplier initiates this by clicking the "Split" button on the "Order to Confirm" tile, inputting multiple dates and comments before submission.

Based on our observations in our environment, the supplier's response is integrated into the S/4HANA Purchase Order in the following manner.

We would like to confirm if this is standard functionality:

1. Comments: The confirmation comments at schedule line level are sorted alphabetically and concatenated in the PO item text.

2. Dates and Quantities: The confirmation records in the PO Item Confirmation tab (EKES table records) are sorted by delivery date.

Additionally, if this is indeed standard behavior, we notice that the sequence of items in points 1 and 2 may not align. Is there a way to synchronize these sequences?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to display PDF by default in /OPT/VIM_...
Re: Custom Tab
entry.content:
Hi 

 

The menu path to access the SAP B1 UI Configuration Template is:

Administration > Utilities > UI Configuration Template.

This will allow you to manage and configure the user interface templates for different users and roles in SAP Business One.

Review the assigned users under the UI Configuration template.

entry.title: A Guide to Identifying the Table from which a CDS View Retrieves Data
entry.content:
When checking a FIORI issue, we can find from which CDS view data is fetched via F12. Now I will get you to find out from which table CDS view retrieves data.

For example, CDS view I_BP_CONTACTS and field PHONENUMBEREXTENSION.
Firstly, go to transaction code SE80, search  I_BP_CONTACTS.

Then in View Fields, we can find the field. Here let us double click on the Table "IBPCNTCTFUNCDEPT".


Finally we can see that the data is from but051- TEL_EXTENS

If the Data Definition is known instead of CDS view, we can find the relevant CDS view as below via SE80. And then, we can follow the steps before.

Hope this blog can help you.

entry.title: Re: Unable to login to SAP Business One due database conn...
entry.content:
• Go to SAP Service Manager > License Manager > Settings > Configure Security, and log in to the System Landscape Directory by entering the B1 site user password.

  • Delete the exstitng server details and Add a new connection using the server's IP address.

  • After refreshing, all the databases appeared in the Companies section.

  • Following this, SAP started functioning on all client machines as well.

entry.title: Re: User login take long time
entry.content: Do you run any add on

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Calculation not reading actual values
entry.content: Is it possible user has no read access actual version?

entry.title: Re: Enable Now Producer not playing
entry.content:
Hi Annie.

It's 10000% the Live Review extension that destroyed the trainer resource after the latest upgrade. 

Remove the Live Review extension Script and Dictionary, then revert the trainer resource in Manager. Not the trainer style, but the trainer resource!

I've seen this issue in my sandbox and in a few customers' systems.

If you need the latest Live Review extension, that works with the 2411 release, I'll send it to you via email.

entry.title: Re: 收货的分录中，存货科目的利润中心是判断什么自动带出的？
entry.content:
Hi Lucy,

是的，是同一個工廠。

Hi Mohit,

User t-code "IEQCM1 - Change Equipment History"

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: Item Cost Not Displaying for a Specific User
entry.content: Check does the user have right General Authorizations

entry.title: Re: How can I create a view of a customer's payment history?
entry.content:
Financials>>Reports>>Accounting>>General Ledger>>select your BP code >>In expanded select Incoming

payments>>untick Accounts and mentioned other details as per your requirement.

entry.title: Re: Automate updates to my dashboard imported from an excel
entry.content: You can configure a file server, and create an import job to import data from the excel inside file server path.

entry.title: Re: Item Cost Not Displaying for a Specific User
entry.content: Hi, we already checked and confirmed that the user has Full Authorization on the Item Cost

entry.title: Event-Event Reasons
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

Once Probation Status is marked as Confirmed, the Employment Type will change to Confirmed, and the column will freeze. No further changes can ever be made to make the employee probationer back.

entry.title: Re: How to redeem a campaign code to get a free SAP Certification exam attempt and schedule your exa
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,I hope this message finds you well !

I have already registered and confirmed my participation in the Digital Skills Initiative, and I completed my learning journey in November, as per the rules. However, I have not yet received the free certificate redemption code. I have also reached out to digitalskills@sap.com multiple times and provided the necessary proof along with screenshots.

I kindly request you to look into this matter and assist me in resolving it. Your Instant response would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for your support !

Best regards,

Hamza Abbas

entry.title: Re: New in Production Accounting – Event-Based Production Cost Posting
entry.content: Hi, in event-based overhead posting, there is no transaction/app to re-calculate based on actual cost rates of production orders. Workaround could be - use allocation cycle to adjust overhead on respective orders manually.

entry.title: Re: SQL API Post Data Issue in MDK V24.11
entry.content: Can you provide more details about what you are posting? Are you calling an MDK action or something else?

entry.title: Re: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content: Hi imaad, thanks for your reply. The issue is that there are many objects involved, and it's difficult to manage them all. Is there any other way we can restore the EHP8 version as the active version in Quality?

entry.title: Re: link sales order reservation to refurbishment order
entry.content:
hello @Vivek_Savant  and thank you for the answer. I understand your question and I will try to explain it as well as I can.

basically we need the following:

we generate a sales order for a customer, selling a programmed board but we purchase the board unprogrammed, hence the requirement for a different material (unprogrammed board).

once this requirement is generated, we must program the board: usually this would be done with a make to order Production order but on this site we did not implement PP. the easiest way for the workers would be to use a refurbishment order since they are using this already.

in the refurbishment order I can enter my requirement: GI of unprogrammed board, work it, GR of programmed board which is what we need to do.

once the programmed board is in stock, we can send it to our customer.

the issue is that the generated requirement of the unprogrammed board from our sales order, does not disappear....

any ideas?

entry.title: open same reports with different parameter values
entry.content:
Hi guys

I have a basic report in CR for enterprise and it uses a parameter filled via URL for years

The report takes some time to load so my user runs it several times in different browser tabs to load simultaneously 

The issue is that it loads with empty parameter values as Crystal tries to load the same report with the same parameter and different values and that causes it to fail

Any ideas how to separate each run and get them to load simultaneously?

 

Regards

Shlomi

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Trace Level is not working
entry.content: I'm also facing the same problem, but for a specific sub-account. Tried with undeploy-deploy, redeploy, but nothing works.

entry.title: Re: How to Handle Missing Source Values and Default to Em...
entry.content:
Please try with map by default

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/map-with-default/qaq-p/5393237

entry.title: Re: SDK Code in Hana
entry.content:
Hi,

 

HANA is Case Sensitive, so your query should take that into account:

Select sum(*) from ODPO A
WHERE
A."CardCode" = "C00001' and A."Canceled" = 'N' and A."DocStatus" = 'O'
 
BR,
Matija

entry.title: Re: SQL API Post Data Issue in MDK V24.11
entry.content: Hello @bill_froelich we are posting the data test and its parameter for that we used form cell simple property for data entry and for posting data we are using Rest service send request action. In previous version MDK i.e. V24.7.5 similar action working properly posting the data but now after migrating the project to V24.11 it gives 406 not acceptable error. this is the action which we are using { "_Type": "Action.Type.RestService.SendRequest", "ActionResult": { "_Name": "PostReport" }, "OnSuccess": "/QA_DigiLab/Actions/ClosePage.action", "Target": { "Service": "/MyAPP/Services/SQL_Service.service", "Path": "path of post url", "RequestProperties": { "Method": "POST", "Body": { "created_by": "257576", "parameter_list": "{#Application/#ClientData/trainingData}", "report_Id": "{#Application/#ClientData/report_Id}", "result": "{#Application/#ClientData/result}", "status": "{#Application/#ClientData/status}", "test_Code": "{#Application/#ClientData/TestCode}" }, "FetchCSRF": true } } }

entry.title: How can I upload multiple alternate parts to the BoM simultaneously
entry.content: Is there any possible to upload the multiple alternate parts to the BoM simultaneously

entry.title: Report for CKMMAT - Material valuation
entry.content:
Hi Team,
In Article Master for site view,
we have Inventory value for Company code currency and Group Currency,
Do we have any report or table, where we can fetch for all articles or selected articles


Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: Can we connect to ECC system without creating Technic...
entry.content:
Hi @manemahesh 

for IDOC it would be technical possible - as long as maintain correctly the Adapter Specific attributes. But now it comes already to a problem - you need to have the Logical System in those Adapter Specific attributes that the IDOC Adapter is able to fill the EDIDC record correctly.  Within your landscape, the logical system in table T000 must not be identical between D/Q/P - as otherwise ALE scenarios won't work.  So to avoid manual rework of the business system after transporting it from D->Q->P in the adapter specific attributes, it's advised to use SLD and setup the transport landscape there.

IF you plan later to setup Proxy interfaces - those won't work without the SLD lookup of the business system. There might be tweaks that you can manually load the information to the cache - but this is even worse to do so.

The technical systems should come from RZ70 distribution. In our company there is a central SLD on solution manager that is propagating to the SLD on PI. But it would work also if PI would be connected directly to central SLD.

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: Use TPM, IA, CI to Efficiently Manage and Run Complex B2B Transactions

entry.title: Re: No option "Custom application" in Create Extension wi...
entry.content: Hi Zhehui, thank for your informations. Can you let me know when the "Custom Application" option will be released?

entry.title: Re: Cash Management: Liquidity Item Derivation in MIRO Tr...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

You can implement own logic in FCLM_LQF_DERIVE_LQITEM_SAMPLE.

Or you can implement BADI_FCLM_FB2_FINAL_DECISION and remove the 'final' flag in case of GR/IR account, to force the system to trace the document flow further.

 

Regards,

Kristof

entry.title: LIV release indicator in SAP Standard table
entry.content: Is it possible to know from any SAP standard Table filed  value entry that indicates about whether one LIV is released or not through MRBR transaction? We need to develop one report to list all the LIV which are released and which are not released with in particular date range.

entry.title: HANA model package tool not available to Download
entry.content:
We have a B1 HANA database connected to service layer.

We want to expose a Calculation view. 

As suggested in the documentation we need to use HANA model package tool but its not available to download. 

How to download or any alternate approach for this?

entry.title: Transmit Purchase Order (PO) to Vendor via Email
entry.content:
Step 1: Define Communication Strategy

To ensure effective communication via Medium 5 (external sending), it's essential to maintain a communication strategy within the Customizing settings that support email. Without an appropriate communication strategy, communication with a partner cannot be established. By default, SAP provides the "CS01" communication strategy.

SPRO > Sales and Distribution > Basic Functions > Output Control > Determine Communication Strategy.

Step 2: Assign the Form and Processing routine to PO Output Type

SPRO > IMG > Material Management > Purchasing > Messages > Forms (Layout Sets) for

Messages > Assign Form and Output Program for Purchase Order

Output Type – NEU

Medium - 5 (External Send)

Program - SAPFM06P

Form Routine - ENTRY_NEU

Form - MEDRUCK

Step 3: Replacement of text symbols

 The replacement routine should be configured in the Customizing settings for the output type, on the 'General data' tab under 'Replacement of text symbols' in the detail screen.

SPRO > IMG > Materials Management > Purchasing > Messages > Output Control >

Message Types > Define Message Types for Purchase Order > Maintain Message Types for PO

Select Output Type "NEU" then click "Details"

Maintain the Replacement of text Symbols Program and FORM routine.

Program: SAPMM06E

FORM routine: TEXT_SYMBOL_REPLACE

Step 4: Maintain Email ID for supplier

You need to ensure that an email address is maintained in the vendor master under the Address View, system will only use the email address stored in the vendor master.

Also maintain your own user email address, this will be the sending email address.

System > User Profile > Own Data

Step 5: Maintain Conditions Records (Transaction: MN04)

Maintain the Condition Record for message Determination.

Select the Output type "NEU" and click "Key Combination"

Supplier: 31000

Partner Function: VN (Vendor)

Medium: 5 (External Send)

Dispatch Time: 4 (Send Immediately "When Saving the Application")

Select the Condition Record and Click "Communication".

Chose communication that we created (Refer step 1)

The "Cover Page Text" will serve as the email's subject. You can use variables (replacement parameters) in the cover page text, which must be enclosed in &. To utilize these replacement parameters, the configuration explained in Step 3 must be completed.

For example, if you want the title to be 'PO number: 100002', you should enter "PO number &EKKO-EBELN&".

Step 6: Create PO and Test the scenario

Create and release the PO

Click on messages to check the output

Output triggered with medium 5 to vendor 31000

Step 7: Check mail in SOST
If the correct SCOT/ SMTP configuration is maintained, emails will be sent to the supplier's email address stored in the Business Partner (BP) record

entry.title: Re: E-Recruitment - Requisition not visible in Recruiter Dashboard
entry.content: How to solve this?

entry.title: Re: BAPI for F-02 and F-05
With the new revamped SCN from where I can access the Bookmarks repository
entry.content:
Hello all, 

With the below thread I was sure that something major with the Bookmarks feature has occurred,

https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/with-the-people-sap-com-getting-deprecated-will-the-bookmarks-get-affected/qaq-p/12817724

With the present forum, I am able to Bookmark a thread but am not able to find a place where I can see the links I have Bookmarked. I checked My Profile, My Contents and all other such possible places but no luck!

Is Bookmark feature still in beta stage ?

I have already lost a big Repo of bookmarks which I had 😞 , want to build it from scratch again aSAP!

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: a xml with two persons details, by using router condition how we can achieve one persons details?
entry.content:
I have a xml payload in that xml payload with two persons details .by using router how we can get one person's details as output. I tried router condition with xml & non-xml type, the output comes as total xml with 2persons details. How we can achieve one person details as output. only with router conditions no other pallets used here. the condition i used "/PersonalDetails/PersonalDetail/PersonalID = '9652' "

<PersonalDetails>
<PersonalDetail>
<PersonalID>9652</PersonalID>
<Name>vishu</Name>
<Pnumber>76546657568</Pnumber>
<Email>smoething@gmail.com</Email>
<State>AndhraPradesh</State>
<Martialstatus>No</Martialstatus>
<Job>Software Engineer</Job>
</PersonalDetail>
<PersonalDetail>
<PersonalID>6789</PersonalID>
<Name>ramki</Name>
<Pnumber>765426567568</Pnumber>
<Email>nothing@gmail.com</Email>
<State>Arunchalpradesh</State>
<Martialstatus>yes</Martialstatus>
<Job>Architecture</Job>
</PersonalDetail>
</PersonalDetails>

entry.title: Re: Stock room management vs Basic EWM vs EWM
entry.content: What do you mean by "availability group"? How it is linked to the topic?

entry.title: Re: No run steps visible in sap cpi trace
entry.content:
Hello,

Please take into consideration this thread which discuss the same issue : Integration Suite Trace Level is not working 

The issue is probably related to recent update and the modification of some basics functionnality of the solution.

It has been pointed out that undeploy following by deploy  seems to solve the problem as it probably cleans more cached data than a simple "redeploy".

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Trace Level is not working
entry.content:
Hello,

I confirm that the issue is not Browser related neither linked to CPI-Helper. In fact when using Cpi-helper to switch trace "on" we can confirm it has worked by checking the artifact status in "Manage Integration Content".

I agree with Walter, the procedure of undeploy (from Manage Integration Content page) then deploy from the iflow editor seems to do the trick.

I suppose it's indeed related to recent update and particularly the evolution of most used bricks like timer and groovy script (but this is only my personnal hypothesis).

entry.title: How to use saved prompts in sap ai launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have configured and deployed a foundation model in SAP AI Launchpad, and we can use it programmatically now. There is a save prompts option in SAP generative ai hub; how can I access these saved model prompts programmatically in the python code running in bas and deployed in cloud foundary?


We are currently using prompts in the code, and it would be extremely helpful if we could use those saved prompts from the launchpad.

Thanks.

entry.title: Unit Price doesn't appear in BOM when I change UoM Group in Item master data
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created a new UoM Group "Coil" with inside different lenghts of coil in centimeter

After, I created a new item B2.680.35.07 with this new UoM Group ,then I created new PO with this item, then I closed the order with a Invoice (in order to load the price unit in SAP price list) IMAGE 1

 

When I open my BOM with inside this item, doesn't appear the unit price so I don't know cost of BOM (IMAGE 2)

Please note that appear price unit of only items with SAP default UoM Group (not price unit of item with new UoM group)

What's happen? Someone can help me to solve this matter?

entry.title: Re: NFC scanning in Work Zone
entry.content:
Awesome blog post @WouterLemaire and a great example of circumventing the given "architecture" limitations. 😄

One minor remark, the snippet extracted for the "Same for the Error event handler but using another action"-part is the same as the previous one. Does not matter much as they're both seen in the snippets afterwards but I thought I'd mention it.

Would be interesting to know if the NFC API would work when used within a worker context (in your case a Shared Worker). Same approach as with the launchpad plugin (which I would prefer, I think) but technically still interesting.

Regards 🙂

entry.title: Starting with BTP trial account, no Europe?
entry.content:
Hello,

I wanted to start with BTP trial account, but when trying to create, the region Europe Frankfurt AWS is missing:

Guide:
Trial Account Setup for SAP Integration Suite (CPI... - SAP Community

regards
Mark

entry.title: Re: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content: you must need to have the list of all objects changed by the import of the request you wrongly imported from dev to qty in previous version. This list is anyway available in the Transport request itself.In quality system Go to each object's version management from there you can select the version of the object in EHP8 which is the version you need then select retrieve so that the version in EHP8 becomes the active version.As you mentioned there are many objects involved the preferred way is to what is suggested in earlier post creating transport of copies and adding objects and moving them to only qty system.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Boost your Developer Experience for CAP Java Development
entry.content:
Hello,

did anyone tried the spring boot dev tools capability (in video at min. 10) in SAP BAS (Business Application Studio)? For me the restart is working, but the livereload not.

Thanks and best regards,

Julian

entry.title: Re: Translation Options in SAP Enable Now and SAP Companion
entry.content:
Hi Kristina,

Great blog, excellent explanation of the topic!

I have a question regarding the translation of SAP Companion. Does translation option make the content permanently translated into a given language (for example, in the SAP Companion Fiori of S/4HANA Cloud Private Editon, the content is in English, but the client wants to see it in Polish), or does the user have to use the icon each time to translate the content into the desired language?

Thanks,

Karol

entry.title: Re: Ariba Network Invoicing with OCR
entry.content:
Hi Velu,

CloudTrade ( OneAdvanced ) would continue to provide the PDF invoicing solution till March 2028. Per the new contract, they would be migrating the existing setup to a SAP managed Azure environment over the next 3-4 months. We expect new onboarding (e.g. new buyers/ suppliers) to commence after May' 2025.

Hope this helps.

Best Regards,

Pushpendu

entry.title: Re: Implementation of BADI_CRM_BUPA_IL_SEARCH not called

Hi,
This may be the badi you are looking for, the methods mentioned in this article are available.
BADI_CRM_BUPA_IL_SEARCH_EXT

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Client IDs in SAP Document Informatio...
entry.content:
Hi Sundar, 

On Trial you are limited to one client only, see Trial Limits
You should be able to delete the default client and create a different one instead in case you want to test the client creation.

Best regards,
Tobias

entry.title: Custom CDS API - Fiori element - control on user
entry.content:
I'm on S4 Public Cloud edition. 
I've created a custom CDS for seeing Purchase requisition of a requestor (based on user id).
The CDS works fine in Data browser

But I expose the CDS by using communication arrangement with a dedicated user.

I've created a Fiori Element App based on this API but the user taken into account is not the connection user but the user of the arrangement. I've deployed it on Cloud foundry (I have the possibility to deploy it also on Build Work Zone)

If someone has an idea to solve this issue. 
Get the user information in the Fiori element and Ask the API with this user ?

As I'm in a public version, I can't develop anything.

entry.title: Use Of Key value map associated in API Proxy
entry.content:
Hi, 

Do you know what is the use of this section in the API proxy? I am using some Key value maps in the policy and I dont see any info under Key value map assocaited in the API proxy page

Were you able to see some entries ? How to bring the entries here when API proxy is using key value map?

 

Regards,

Muni

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Calculation not re...
entry.content:
Hi @LavanyaPoluru 

In general, the RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Committed_In_SAP",[d/Version]="public.Actual") can retrieve data from the actual version if the data exists. If it cannot retrieve the actual version data, the fact data on the actual version might be assigned to a "not in hierarchy" member. 

To read fact data assigned to the "not in hierarchy" member, you can add the following configuration to the data action script, which will enable access to the data.

  • CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY = [d/Account],[d/Entity]

Please add all dimensions that are listed on the dimension selection popup.

I hope this is helpful to you, and if I have misunderstood anything, please feel free to reach out.

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: Error when modifying SY-SUBRC in S/4HANA Cloud Public...
entry.content:
Hi @DiegoValdivia 

please have a look at Setting Your Own Variables in the ABAP Debugger in the Context of Public Cloud:

In ABAP environment, you have the following possibilities for doing changes while debugging:

  • You can only change your own variables.

  • You can use the function Jump to Line in your own ABAP source code only.

...

you cannot ....

  • Change system fields (for example, <SY-SUBRC>)

...

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Re: Intercompany PO API THROUGH POSTMAN"MEPO/043","messag...
entry.content:
Hello, 

this answer is coming too late, but we faced the same issue today

By adding "SupplyingPlant" to the payload, the issue "please enter an order quantity" (MEPO/043) was solved. But we are in an STO Stock Transfer Order scenario. I am not sure you are also in the same kind of scenario.

Our payload: 

{
    //"PurchaseOrder": "",
    "PurchaseOrderType": "NB",
    "PurchaseOrderDate": "2024-12-18",
    "Supplier": "your supplier",
    "CompanyCode": "your CompanyCode",
    "DocumentCurrency": "USD",
    "PurchasingOrganization": "your PurchasingOrganization",
    "PurchasingGroup": "your PurchasingOrganization",
    "SupplyingPlant": "P095", //This is mandatory for STO (Stock Transfer Orders) 
    "_PurchaseOrderItem": [
        {
            "PurchaseOrderItem": "10",
            "Material": "Your material",
            "Plant": "Your plant",
            "OrderQuantity": 4,
            "PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit": "PC",
            "OrderPriceUnit": "PC",
            "DocumentCurrency": "USD",
            "NetPriceAmount": 250,
            "NetPriceQuantity": 1
        }
    ]
}

Regards

entry.title: Kit to stock process trigger from EWM using VAS order error
entry.content:
Dear members,

I met a question after I create a VAS order for Kit to stock. EWM system create OBD and IBD. But IBD wasn't created in ERP system. OBD could be created successfully. I check the IDOC queue system show error message as below. Does anyone know how to resolve it?

Error while determining ref.mov.type for WM via Table 156S: 521/ / / / /X/

 

System reference configration follow as below

EWM Document type mapping

ERP Delivery Item category

ERP sales item category

 

 

 

EWM - Goods Movement EWM - Delivery Processing EWM - Basic Functions EWM - Basis

The only one that provides me a close result to what is expected is the Fiori App "Asset Sheet History", but still there is one field I cannot get from it which I expect, that is the description of the asset (ANLA-TXT50 I guess). Is there any simple way I could add this information to the grill ?
Kind regards

It works with Firefox or Edge.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certification exam for India region From SAP Training S
entry.content: Also, one possibility is to "create a case" at SAP support here (at the bottom of the page): https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter/certification-support

entry.title: SAP on IBM i: SAP Support Required PTF Lists have been updated
entry.content:
Last week, IBM i 7.5 TR5 was released along with Db2 for i PTF Group SF99950 Level 8, as well as IBM i 7.4 TR 11 along with Db2 for i PTF Group SF99704 Level 29. You can get a quick overview over the enhancements for IBM i 7.5 at https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/ibm-i-75-tr5-enhancements and for IBM i 7.4 at https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/ibm-i-74-tr11-enhancements. A general entry point for the various Technology Refreshes with their enhancements can be found at https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/node/1119129.

The SAP Support Required PTF Lists, formerly known as Information APARs, have been updated to include these new levels. Together with the Technology Refreshes and the Db2 for i PTF groups, the cumulative PTF packages and the High Impact/Pervasive PTF groups were updated. For IBM i 7.3 and IBM i 7.2, only the High Impact/Pervasive PTF groups were updated. A few individual PTFs that are not yet part of a PTF group or cumulative PTF package were added as well.

The PTF lists can be found at the following links:

IBM i 7.5: https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/sap-support-required-ptf-list-ibm-i-75
IBM i 7.4: https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/sap-support-required-ptf-list-ibm-i-74
IBM i 7.3: https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/sap-support-required-ptf-list-ibm-i-73
IBM i 7.2: https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/sap-support-required-ptf-list-ibm-i-72

If you want to download the PTF lists to your SAP systems with the help of a program, take a look at our sample program and blog entry from July 18th, 2022.

Note: If your current PTF level is older than June 2024, you may be affected by the security changes that we described in our blog article from June 18, 2024: SAP on IBM i: New PTF Groups trigger IBM i administrator actions. To prevent or overcome the potential authority failures, you can either follow the instructions in the blog article or upgrade your SAP Host Agent to release 7.22, patch level 65 or higher.

We recommend that you apply the current PTF levels for preventive maintenance whenever you are performing your next scheduled maintenance.

entry.title: How to check the status of SAP Cloud ALM service key
entry.content:
I am currently trying to connect Cloud ALM to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

I am following the steps with reference to the following guide:
https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/setup-managed-services/setup-s4hana-cloud.html?anchorId=section_copy

I understand that as a prerequisite, I need to obtain an SAP Cloud ALM service key.

However, I don't know how to check if the service key has already been obtained.
I would like to know how to check.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check the status of SAP Cloud ALM service key
entry.content:
The service key can be check in two ways:

1. In BTP Cockpit

  1. Log on to the SAP BTP cockpit.
  2. Click on your SAP Cloud ALM global account, then on your SAP Cloud ALM sub-account.
  3. In the navigation panel, choose Services > Instances and Subscriptions.
  4. Under Instances click on the relevant instance of the service SAP Cloud ALM API
  5. In the area that opens, choose Service Keys.
  6. You see your service key in JSON format. The key includes the application URL, service URL, client ID, and client secret.
  7. Download this service key and save it for later

2. In Cloud ALM - Landscape Management, click on Configuration -> section "SAP Cloud ALM Service Key".

You can get more information in SAP Expert Portal of Retrieve SAP Cloud ALM Service Key:
https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/integration-monitoring/calm-connect.html

Best regards,
Ellie
SAP Support

Sijin

entry.title: Re: Where can I find my bookmarks in Community 2024?
entry.content:
Go to "My content":

My Content page:

Scroll down to the bottom right part of the "My content" page:

entry.title: SAP Datasphere News in December
entry.content:
What a year it has been. Wow! 2024 was packed with great events, lots of new features and enhancements to extend existing features. Explore the latest updates in our community news blogs and enjoy watching my top feature highlights for 2024 on YouTube below.

 

SAP Datasphere 2024 highlights in a nutshell

What a great ride it has been in 2024 with SAP Datasphere!
Let me share a few of my personal highlights.

 

184 innovations were delivered according to What's New in SAP Datasphere on SAP Help. This is just the tip of the iceberg, and we know there is always a demand for more features and even quicker delivery. Thousands of code lines were written, tested, deployed and finally delivered as part of the solution. Kudos 👏 to all you developers, UX designers, fellow product managers to make this happen. You guys rock 💪

20k+ views of monthly top feature videos on YouTube about SAP Datasphere. I started this monthly series in January 2024 and did not expect this kind of success. Thanks for bearing with me and all the great feedback I got ❤️

11,967 attendees live at all SAP Datasphere sessions at SAP TechEd. This year we only had a virtual TechEd event. Personally, I love the onsite events and the interaction with customers, partners, consultants at our both and also during the lectures and hands-on sessions. Nevertheless, the studio interaction with my partners in crime Nikola Braukmüller and Dominik Kurz was lots of fun. Blessed to have such great teammates 🙏

 

My top features in 2024

Picking my top features for all of 2024 was not easy and here is my top feature list in no particular order.

Folder Support

In January we delivered the long-awaited support for folders inside the data builder and repository of SAP Datasphere. The feature allows to organize your content in folders within a space.

 

Nested & Shared Task Chains

February already covered my next favorite feature which are nested task chains, so the ability to use other task chains within a task chain. These meta chains help you coordinate many other task chains and since November you can share them across spaces to enable global task chains.

 

Confluent Kafka

Event streaming is a great way of data exchange between systems. Confluent is one of our open data ecosystem partners and this year we delivered Confluent Kafka as a target earlier in the year, and since November we also support Confluent Kafka as a source in replication flows to enable end-to-end scenarios.

 

Column Level Lineage

As a data modeler and data integrator it is always good to understand the flow of data on a field level. With the column level lineage, the impact and lineage analysis is now enabled to get one level deeper and allows you to select one or more columns in your analyzed object and show their sources and the columns that they impact.

 

Elastic Compute Nodes

The elastic compute nodes (ECN) enable you to get additional compute resources on-demand – while keeping your baseline compute resources untouched. You can spin up ECN’s according to your own schedule to help you expand elasticity during peak consumption scenarios and decommission them during regular operations.

 

Object store (Controlled availability)

With our final release of the year, we delivered the object store in a controlled availability. The object store provides an inbound layer to stage data in a cost-effective way. You can use replication flows to replicate data to local tables (file) and you can optionally further prepare the data with Apache Spark-based transformation flows. You can then share the tables to standard spaces, where they can be used as sources for flows, views, and analytic models (SAP Note 3525760, 3538038).

 

 

And more feature highlights of 2024

There are so many more great features which we delivered in 2024, so in addition to my 2024 top features, I pulled together the 2024 feature highlights in all different areas of SAP Datasphere for you. Enjoy the ride!

 

Data Modelling

 

Catalog & CLI

 

Data Integration

 

Spaces, Elasticity, Transport and more

 

My top blogs in December

This second blog in the SAP BW series by @SandyTran offers great value to our big community of BW experts looking for options on how to implement certain functions well known from SAP BW and BW/4HANA inside of SAP Datasphere. Especially interesting are the dynamic filtering options.
➡️  SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started (Part 2)

@Sefan_Lindersexplains how you can access two SAP Datasphere spaces using the same SQL user and gives you a step-by-step guide how you create such a user
➡️  Create a SQL user with access to multiple spaces in SAP Datasphere

 

Find more information and related blog posts on the topic page for SAP Datasphere. You will find further product information on our Community with various subpages about Business Content, the SAP BW Bridge as well as content for Best Practices & Troubleshooting. Also check out the new support content for SAP Datasphere on SAP Help for troubleshooting and analysis guides, how-to guides, technical details, and more.

Find out how to unleash the power of your business data with SAP’s free learning content on SAP Datasphere. It’s designed to help you enrich your data projects, simplify the data landscape, and make the most out of your investment. Check out even more role-based learning resources and opportunities to get certified in one place on  SAP Learning site.

entry.title: Re: Configuring RE Accrual engine
entry.content: Hello Thais, did you find resolution to extend this posting to IFRS as well? I have a similar problem now.

entry.title: Query Based Approval is not working while UPDATE the Document
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Enclosed Scheer Shot FYR,

Maker ID: 101313 Checker ID: 117528
We have one UDF like U_FAItem
Approval Template working based on Query (SELECT Distinct 'TRUE' FROM OPOR WHERE $[OPOR."U_FAItem"] = 'YES' and $[OPOR."BPLName"] = 'Chennai')


When maker create a Purchase Order in Chennai Branch for Fixed asset Items.
That time approval template is working. And Purchase order go for approval.

Now our problem is, This approval template is not working when UPDATE the purchase order by maker after posted from Draft.

When we have a condition like "Launch Approval Process: Always" under Terms tab, the template will working properly.
When we have a Query, the template is not working.

Kindly provide the solution for this. This is Audit related issues. Need your valuable reply ASAP.

entry.title: Re: Thumbnail Image of product is not working
entry.content:
"The ability to display the image attached to a Product in the Product master data is currently not available"

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2749903

entry.title: Re: Thumbnail Image of product is not working
entry.content:
Hi Jayshree

The ability to display the image attached to a Product in the Product master data is currently not available

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2749903

entry.title: Re: Where can I find my bookmarks in Community 2024?
entry.content:
You can also navigate to "My content" -> "My settings" -> "Subscriptions & Notifications" -> "My Bookmarks" to see all your bookmarks in a list view. 
Here you can manage your bookmarks as well, like delete the ones you no longer wish to keep.

entry.title: Emarsys API Trigger Contact Registration
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

trying out the new API - Trigger Contact Registration https://api.emarsys.net/api/v3/form/{formId}/trigger ( https://dev.emarsys.com/docs/core-api-reference/lcmufjdft5iuz-trigger-contact-registration) and facing the issue that it seams that it only works for existing contacts (error message = No contact found with the external id) ? Does anyone know more about it, API documentation say nothing in detail about that. Thanks for your support.

 

Kind regards,

Dominik

entry.title: Re: LO_BCS Creates folder in client's outlook for PDF print.
entry.content: Can you share code snippet how are you attaching the file? Most likely there is some bug

entry.title: Moving WBS Element in Release of Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hi ,

I am requesting assistance in moving the WBS (Work Breakdown Structure) element currently located in the "Accounting Assignment" section of purchase order (PO) items to the "General Information" section of purchase order releases 

Could you please guide me on the appropriate process or steps to accomplish this change?

entry.title: Vendor Payment Process After Item Is Sold
entry.content: We are exploring a vendor payment process based on the sale of items and need clarification on whether SAP supports this scenario natively. In our process, the stock is owned by our company upon receipt into our warehouses or stores, but payment to the vendor is triggered only after the stock is sold to the end customer. At the end of the month, the invoice is cleared, and payment is made to the vendor based on the number of sales. If such a solution exists, could you please provide guidance on its implementation or configuration? If not, are there any recommendations or best practices for addressing this scenario through enhancements?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANa for Product Compliance Data Migration approach: Raw Materials - Bulk vs Packaged
entry.content:
Hi Paulo,

in Product Compliance New you should always create a compliance view for an unpackaged product (UP). In case you do have an actual unpackaged/bulk product master, you will link it. In case you don't have a product master, you will just create the compliance view object without any link to an unpackaged product master. In both cases you will link the packaged product masters in the unpackaged compliance view. So 2.1 and 2.2 could be addressed with one UP with links to the sold product masters. 2.3 would be separate UPs: one for the raw material and one for the sold product, which then uses the raw material in its BOM / material based composition.

Hope that helps.

Ralf
